Manufacturer & Exporter of Premium Quality Himalayan Salt Products

Scroll down to content

HOME

Welcome to CRAFTIMUS INDUSTRIES Pvt. Ltd

16 Years of Experience in

Manufacturing & Exporting of

Premium Quality Himalayan Salt Products

HIMALAYAN SALT PRODUCTS
Edible Himalayan Salt Catergory
PREMIUM QUALITY GUARANTEED
100% AUTHENTIC HIMALAYAN SALT

INTRODUCTION

CRAFTIMUS INDUSTRIES is the leading company of Pakistan having core experience in Processing & Exporting of Onyx, Marble Products and Handicrafts, Granite, Lapis Lazuli, Gemstones , Himalayan Salt Products and Sandstone from Pakistan to worldwide market.

QUALITY COMMITMENT

We are among the prominent players in Processing & Export Industry of Pakistan as manufacturer & exporter with 15+ years of experience in manufacturing & export. Our aim is to provide Quality products with premium packaging to boost your business and help you in a highly competitive world.

OUR VISION

To be a modern, progressive , effective & credible organization for optimizing buyer’s (Importer, Distributor, Whole Seller, Retailer, User, Employee & Share Holder) cost to benefit value in strict compliance to global standards.”

OUR MISSION

We are committed to create & bring in highly motivated, satisfied, dedicated and professional team of people to look after craftimus’s short term and long terms objective without compromising on the objectives of themselves.

CORE VALUES

Our Core Values are not open for discussions.

  • Professionalism
  • Transparency
  • Fair Deal
  • Compliance to Global Standards
  • Integrity
  • Quality Materials

Products We Export:

  • HIAMLAYAN SALT PRODUCTS
  • FINE & EDIBLE HIMALAYAN SALT
  • ONYX & MARBLE PRODUCTS
  • ONYX & MARBLE HANDICRAFTS
  • LAPIS LAZULI CRAFTS
  • WOODEN CRAFTS
